working_on.task: Migrate state to ViewModel and Fix Coroutine Cancellation

pending_tasks.task: 🟢 LOW: Fix final flaky assertion in PythonUpdateCheckerTest (Singleton conflict)
🟢 LOW: Add Strict VideoID Regex validation before passing to backend
Future: Migrate off Chaquopy to drop 2.5s overhead

recent_changes.description: Migrated UI state management from remember { mutableStateOf } to AndroidViewModel (SummaryViewModel) for better lifecycle persistence.
Implemented Coroutine ensureActive() guard in SummarizationRepository to prevent processing stale data after cancellation (Fix ISSUE_003).
Implemented auto-check for youtube-transcript-api updates on PyPI with 24h cache and runtime version detection.

errors_encountered.error: Kotlin compilation error: Expecting a top level declaration
errors_encountered.solution: Fixed duplicate code and misplaced class closing brace in MainActivity.kt during ViewModel refactoring.
Added internal 'testVersion' to bypass JNI dependency during JVM tests.

decisions_made.reason: Ensures the summarization pipeline survives Activity destruction during configuration changes (Fix ISSUE_004).
Chaquopy JNI calls are non-interruptible; this guard ensures processing stops as soon as control returns to Kotlin if the job was cancelled.
